title: Lindsay 80% MAP Protocol
description: Race-specific threshold improvement for trained cyclists
purpose: Race-specific threshold improvement for trained cyclists

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/7. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/7. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 5:00 at 105-105% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/7. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 105% for 5:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 24% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 5:00 at 105%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/7. You're building something real here. 5 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/7. You've accumulated 5min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 1:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 1:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 1:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 105%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 36% through session. Rep 3/7. You've done 10min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/7. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/7. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 3/7. 105%, 75-85 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 27 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 50-55% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 1:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 1:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 1:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 45% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 105% for 5:00. Next up: 1:00 recovery, then 5min at 105%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 45% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 45% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. 105% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 1:00. Then 27min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 50-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 55% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 1min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 55% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 55% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 55% done. 105% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 63% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 1:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 16 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 6: 105% FTP. You're 40 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 40 minutes of work done. 16 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 40 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 40 minutes in. 105% FTP, 95-105 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 73% done. 0 intervals left. 15 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 1:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 5:00 at 105%. Empty the tank. You've got 10 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 5:00 at 105%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 5:00 at 105%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 10 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 5:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 105-105% FTP, 95-105 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 51 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 83% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
